subject: An armored bird-humanoid creature diving from the sky
description: A large bird-humanoid creature plunges toward the viewer from a bright sky filled with dramatic clouds. Its wings are spread wide, dark blue-black with iridescent feather sheen, each feather clearly articulated. The creature wears close-fitting armored plating in deep blue and black with gold trim accents, and has a prominent beak-like face with a dark helm. Small gold chains or shackles are visible at the wrists. A radiant light source — possibly the sun — blazes behind and above, creating a strong backlit halo effect. The diving posture and wing spread fill nearly the entire frame.
foreground: Bird-humanoid in full dive, wings spread, beak-helm, gold-trim armor
background: Bright cloudy sky with sun or radiant source above
emotion: aggressive dive posture; body language is predatory and swift
